Home / Services / Roof Replacement

Roof Replacement

Upgrade your home with a durable, long-lasting roof replacement.

Is your roof showing its age? Rafael And Iris Roofing offers complete roof replacement services to homeowners throughout Los Angeles. We understand that a new roof is a significant investment, and we're committed to providing a seamless and stress-free experience.

We offer a wide variety of roofing materials to suit your style and budget, including asphalt shingles, tile, metal, and flat roofing systems. Our experienced team will help you choose the best option for your home, considering factors such as durability, energy efficiency, and aesthetic appeal. We handle every aspect of the roof replacement process, from removing the old roof to installing the new one with precision and care.

A new roof can improve your home's curb appeal, increase its value, and provide long-lasting protection from the elements. Contact Rafael And Iris Roofing for a free consultation and estimate. We'll help you choose the perfect roof for your Los Angeles home.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Thorough inspection of your existing roof and assessment of your needs.
  2. 02 Step 2: Assistance in selecting the best roofing materials for your home and budget.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional removal of your old roof and preparation of the roof deck.
  4. 04 Step 4: Expert installation of your new roof with attention to detail.

Benefits

  • Increases home value
  • Enhances curb appeal
  • Provides long-lasting protection
  • Improves energy efficiency

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a roof replacement typically take?

The duration of a roof replacement depends on the size and complexity of the roof, but most projects are completed within 3-5 days.

Do you offer financing options for roof replacement?

Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your roof replacement more affordable.

What type of warranty do you offer on roof replacements?

We offer comprehensive warranties on both materials and workmanship, providing you with peace of mind.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with roof replacement? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +18186299994
